name: commit-commands
description: Repository-aware Git commit, pull request publishing, and stale branch cleanup skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Safe Git commit, PR publishing, and branch cleanup skills.
interface.longDescription: A native Codex skill adaptation of Anthropic's commit-commands plugin. It provides $commit, $commit-push-pr, and $clean-gone, and can select them from explicit natural-language intent while preserving repository policy and Codex attribution.
defaultPrompt: Create one safe commit for my current changes.
Publish my work branch and open a pull request.
Clean merged local branches whose upstream is gone.
